families.decision: compare commits, trees, manifests and branches; do not infer canonical from date suffix
branch/history comparison required; zero-size member cannot be treated as disposable
inventory all family branches and compare manifests before canonical recommendation

subfamilies.decision: compare upstream history, project structure, manifests and branches before declaring version lineage or canonical repository
keep separate from planner repositories; verify domain/API references and manifests before confirming it belongs to the appointment product family

families.boundary_rule: Planner repositories and mobile application repositories are separate architectural subfamilies. Shared appointment-domain purpose may place them under one product umbrella, but does not make them duplicates or versions of each other.
families.migration_rule: Produce separate canonical recommendations and migration entries for Planner Web and Mobile Application. Preserve integration contracts between them as explicit dependencies.
